objectives: measure consumer satisfaction with mobile carriers
brief.audience_criteria: US adults 25-54 with active mobile phone plan
brief.business_context: quarterly tracker for a Fortune 500 mobile carrier
brief.hypothesis: satisfaction varies materially by carrier and plan type

questions.text: How satisfied are you with your current mobile carrier?
How satisfied are you with your current mobile plan's value for money?
How likely are you to recommend your carrier to a friend or colleague?
Which factor matters most when choosing a mobile carrier?
How would you rate your carrier's network coverage in your area?
